description_long: This hamburger features a soft, plain white bun with a smooth, slightly golden-brown surface. The top bun is thick and domed, covering a generous beef patty that is topped with a slice of melted yellow cheese. Crisp green lettuce and a slice of red tomato are visible beneath the patty, along with a layer of creamy white sauce and a dark, glossy sauce, likely barbecue or a similar condiment. The bottom bun is slightly compressed, showing some sauce and vegetable edges peeking out. The overall appearance is appetizing, with the ingredients layered neatly and visibly fresh.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain white bun, beef patty, melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, and sauces, all stacked in a neat, appetizing arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger's bun, lettuce, tomato, and a hint of sauce peeking out from the sides.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the glossy dark sauce and the edge of the patty, with less visible lettuce and tomato.
description_view_2: The patty and melted cheese are most prominent here, with lettuce and sauce visible beneath the patty.
description_view_3: This angle shows the layered toppings, including lettuce, tomato, cheese, and both sauces, with the bun slightly lifted.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and tomato are layered beneath the patty, with cheese melted on top of the patty and sauces distributed above and below the vegetables.
